summary:
The fix is verified. All tests pass:

- Direct access to `/api/users` without auth: 401 (correct)
- With valid auth: 200 (correct)
- Double-slash bypass (`//api/admin`): 401 (correctly blocked)
- Path traversal (`/health/../api/data`): 401 (correctly blocked)
- Sensitive data is protected

The vulnerability has been fixed by ensuring the auth middleware checks the cleaned path, not the raw path, before enforcing authentication requirements.
